headline: Beyond research, I recharge through music, training, and travel.

sections.title: Music
sections.description: I play a range of instruments, but the guitar is my strongest. My musical roots are in heavy metal and metalcore; anything with powerful distortion and intensity. Many of my research hours have been fueled by these sounds. Occasionally, I record and share covers as well.

sections.title: Fitness
sections.description: Growing up on Dragon Ball Z inspired my interest in strength and heavy lifting. Since then, I've explored and studied different training methods. Lately, I've been shifting toward a more balanced approach, combining free weights with focused strength training.

sections.title: Travel
sections.description: I have visited more than 24 countries. Exposure to different cultures has shaped how I collaborate and communicate across global teams.
